raw_narrative: SAN FRANCISCO (SFO), UAL1871, B738. UAL1871 was pushed onto the ramp from Gate D16. The pilot reported to ground control that they may have pushed into another aircraft. Airfield ops and the fire department were called to the scene and confirmed that they had pushed back into an aircraft in Gate E5, UAL769, which was proposed to depart but had not yet pushed from the gate. No injuries were reported; however, the aircraft were pulled back into the gate, and both aircraft deboarded. It was reported to the tower from airfield ops that UAL1871 had a bent horizontal stabilizer and that UAL769 had damaged the exhaust column. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Substantial. 9/2/2025 0412Z.

(CFO), N6439N, C210. N6439N blew a flat tire (nose wheel) while landing on RWY08 and was unable to exit the runway. The maintenance crew towed the aircraft off the runway. There was damage to airport property. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 1, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. Late Report: 11/24/2025 0010Z.

(RNT), (MEDEVAC), LN667LF, PC-12. LN667LF was en route to the RNT Airport and experienced severe turbulence. RNT Local Controller received a call from S46 that LN667LF at 20 miles north had structural damage due to severe turbulence. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 4, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 12/16/2025 2024Z.

(WSC ROC), (SIT), (ASA62), N644AS, B737. ASA62 (JNU-SIT) IFR struck by lightning while on approach, causing damage to a winglet. No FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Minor. 12/16/2025 0400Z.

raw_narrative: (RNO), (SPZ), N87PM, M20J. N87PM crashed near 39.410589/-119.232674. The RNO Tower was notified by the Lyon Company dispatch about the downed aircraft east of the SPZ Airport between the airport and HWY 95. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: 2- Serious, Damage: Substantial. 12/17/2025 2038Z.

(RHV), N3547H, C172. N3547H was in the run-up area for a run-up before departure. The Ground control noticed N3547H appeared to be on fire and notified the Airport Operations. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 12/17/2025 2239Z.

(GCN), N196GC, C208. N916GC was cleared for the option to RWY21, and upon touchdown, the pilot notified the Control Tower about a blown tire. The aircraft was later tugged back to the ramp. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 12/17/2025 1708Z.

(ZDV), (DEN), N88EJ, E55P. N88EJ (IFR) departed KAPA to KSMO westbound through 270-209 , when it encountered severe turbulence. This resulted in a crack in the interior windshield. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: Unknown, Damage: Unknown. 12/18/2025 0027Z.
(CFO), N529MW, , AR-1 GYRO. N529MW was taking off when the main rotor struck the rudder. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 1, Injuries: None, Damage: Substantial. 12/16/2025 1745Z.

sources_json: [{"title": "Aviation Safety Network entry for N745B (unlawful interference at Van Nuys)", "url": "https://aviation-safety.net/wikibase/563740", "publisher": "Aviation Safety Network", "date": "2025-12-18"}]
raw_narrative: (FTW FSS), (VNY), N745B, C172. N745B crashed into Hangar H9 after attempted theft. The suspect fled scene and was later apprehended. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 1, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 12/18/2025 1300Z.

(FTW FSS), (O85), N19SB, C337. N19SB (VFR) landed long on RWY16 and could not make the turn and struck a blue reflector light while taxiing to the ramp. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 2, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 12/18/2025 1706Z.

(FTW FSS), (F70), N8155S, ACFT TYPE. N8155S stated loss of power at 8,500 feet, glided for a while before making an emergency landing in a field 5 miles east of F70. The aircraft sustained damage to the tail. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 2, Injuries: None, Damage: Substantial. 12/20/2025 0437Z.

(SEE), N68830, PT-13D. N68830 was cleared to land on RY27R. While landing on RWY27R, the aircraft lost control and ground spins on the runway, scraped the wing, and ran into the grass between TWY Charlie and RWY27R. The aircraft came to a stop on TWY Charlie. The pilot immediately stated they were okay and did not need any medical or mechanical assistance. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 2, Injuries: None, Damage: Substantial. 12/19/2025 2102Z.

(APA), XSR226, GL5T. XSR226 (IFR) departed RWY35R and reported a bird strike. The aircraft returned and landed safely. Airport operations reported a small dent in the aircraft’s horizontal stabilizer. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 3, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 12/20/2025 1924Z.

(ZOA), (SJC), ASA1303, B739. ASA1303 (IFR) checked on with ZOA and reported moderate borderline severe turbulence at FL330. The pilot later reported that a flight attendant fell and hurt her knee. The flight attendant declined medical attention upon landing. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: Unknown, Damage: Unknown. 12/20/2025 0312Z.
